queue_route.job: Prioritize compliance review work and route to decision room.
queue_route.proof: Queue rows route to /compliance/reviews/:id/decision-room and copy says queue rows cannot release, block, export or expose client-visible content.

decision_room_route.job: Review one compliance object with evidence, policy, preconditions, request/block controls and audit context.
decision_room_route.proof: Release control is blocked_static; Request Evidence and Keep Blocked require confirmation/audit.

release_confirmation_route.job: Confirm an explicit compliance release with checklist, client-safe preview candidate, exact phrase and audited workflow.
release_confirmation_route.proof: Release modal requires acknowledgement, exact phrase RELEASE CLIENT-SAFE JOURNEY and uses audited action client.

interaction_requirements: Decision room must show release preconditions before release controls.
Release must remain visibly blocked when evidence, policy, reviewer or approver prerequisites are missing.
Request Evidence and Keep Blocked must require confirmation and audit context.
Release confirmation must be separate from queue row selection and separate from client acceptance/export.
Client-safe preview must be marked as candidate until release succeeds.

existing_ui_inventory.evidence: Phase6DecisionRoomPanel, CompliancePreconditionChecklist, StickyActionZone, AuditTimeline and SensitiveWorkflowConfirmationModal.
Exact phrase, acknowledgement checkbox, client-safe preview candidate, evidence & audit panel and no-overclaim lifecycle attributes.
Queue handoff only; release boundary rail marks client visibility blocked.

source_evidence.role: Implements compliance queue, decision room and release confirmation surfaces.
Verifies P06 compliance and audit gates are rendered on compliance surfaces.
Verifies decision room precondition checklist, blocked release control, request evidence CTA and no overclaim copy.

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/p44-phase7-certification.spec.ts tests/scf-p04-p06-flow-ui.spec.ts tests/release-spine-command-surface.spec.ts tests/recommendation-review-workflow-api.spec.ts tests/journey-api.spec.ts --workers=1

validation.positive_acceptance_result: Decision room surface exists as a real compliance workspace with blocked release, request evidence and block controls.
validation.negative_acceptance_result: Queue visibility does not release, export or expose client-visible content.

bold_cleanup_recommendations: Extract ComplianceDecisionRoom as a first-class shared component instead of keeping the route implementation buried in the broad InternalWorkflowScreen file.
Move Request Evidence, Keep Blocked and Release control definitions into a typed decision-room action registry.
Remove static held Export/Refresh controls from the compliance queue unless they receive typed handlers and precondition proof.
